_readme: E2a VERBNET DIAGNOSTIC assumption block, ids ASM-2170..2178 (9 entries) — EMITTED by the Fable diagnostic agent analyst-7 (2026-07-13) for central registration by the coordinator WITH THE COMMIT; registry/assumptions.jsonl is NOT touched by this pass (no git actions, diagnostic-role constraint).

RANGE STATUS at emission: the task authorized >= 2170; verified free by repo-wide grep at emission (max ASM id referenced anywhere is 2165, and poc/scale/asm-2160-2169.json reserves through 2169). The coordinator may remap with a note per the ASM-2117 precedent.

SCOPE: this block records a PURE DIAGNOSTIC for maintainer decision #29 (is the E0 O2 starvation rule-limited or inventory-limited?). It adopts NO construct, freezes NOTHING, authors NO lemma, runs NO engine, reads NO outcome, and states NO feasibility conclusion on CORRECTNESS or EFFICIENCY. Companion artifacts: poc/engine-inference/e2a-verbnet-diagnostic/{mapping-and-audit.md, e2a_verbnet_diagnostic.py, e2a-result.json, vn-mapping.json, selrestr-side-table.json, verbnet/}. Tags: MEASURED | DERIVED | STIPULATED.

assumptions.claim: E2A SCOPE AND CUSTODY: the E2a step is executed as an outcome-blind $0 DIAGNOSTIC ONLY. The script poc/engine-inference/e2a-verbnet-diagnostic/e2a_verbnet_diagnostic.py imports ONLY engineinf_wn (never twin_engine or engineinf_lib; asserted mechanically at exit per the ASM-2135 discipline) and consumes ONLY item inventories (holdout/items-h.json, results/items.json, holdout-manifest counts for cross-check). It never opens gold-h.json, rows.jsonl, orbit-rows.jsonl, run-result.json, or any decision artifact; every emitted number is an outcome-free census of pinned items and ASM-2106 cell keys (the KILL-e1 arithmetic). The admissibility of any VerbNet-based O2 anomaly gold remains a maintainer construct decision (#29; e0-kill-steering-synthesis.md maintainer-owned section); no frozen or locked design document is modified by this pass.
assumptions.rationale: The steering synthesis prescribes E2a as an outcome-blind construct-validity measurement BEFORE any construct decision; encoding the custody as module-import assertions and an explicit forbidden-input list makes outcome-blindness checkable, not promised.
assumptions.backing_ref: poc/engine-inference/e2a-verbnet-diagnostic/e2a_verbnet_diagnostic.py (custody self-check at end of main); poc/engine-inference/e0-kill-steering-synthesis.md; ASM-2104/2105/2140

assumptions.claim: VERBNET PIN: VerbNet 3.3 is pinned at poc/engine-inference/e2a-verbnet-diagnostic/verbnet/verbnet-vn3.3.zip, sha256 f11c901c21494a319e3bfaa56fab89f4e855d348629275293decce2ea2fd8ef7 (1,523,185 bytes; GitHub cu-clear/verbnet zipball of tag vn-3.3 = commit 90f85a63c2c7a019a20aca5032c9672536fe78ce; fetched 2026-07-13; manifest verbnet/manifest.json). The diagnostic consumes ONLY the canonical released subset verbnet3.3/*.xml (329 class files) [STIPULATED choice, disclosed]; the zipball's verbnet-test/ and vn-gl/ variants are not consumed. The script verifies the sha before consuming any byte (fail closed).
assumptions.rationale: The design's E1 row names a VerbNet selectional-restriction pin as the anomaly-gold upgrade path; the diagnostic needs the same pin discipline as SemCor (ASM-2139) so its counts are reproducible from pinned bytes alone.

assumptions.claim: WN<->VERBNET SENSE MAPPING RULE (predefined, outcome-free): a minted kernel-v1 synset is VerbNet-covered iff some canonical class or subclass has a MEMBER whose name equals the Stage-A lemma and whose wn attribute contains a sense key mapping, via the pinned WN3.1 index.sense (key + '::'), to that synset. '?'-prefixed keys (VerbNet's own uncertainty mark) are excluded and logged; empty wn attributes are logged; excluded/outside senses are out of scope. Sense keys are assumed stable across WN 3.0/3.1 — the identical version-stability assumption the SemCor holdout mapping already carries (ASM-2139(b)). VerbNet covers verbs only: friend (noun lemma) is structurally out of scope, logged vn-verbs-only.
assumptions.rationale: The steering synthesis requires the sense/class mapping to be predefined and auditable rather than tuned; fixing the membership rule to exact-lemma MEMBER entries with pinned-index key resolution leaves no discretionary joint in what 'covered' means.

assumptions.claim: UNDERGOER-ROLE AND MULTI-CLASS RULES (predefined): (a) the VerbNet role corresponding to the instrument's undergoer slot is the role of the SECOND NP in the frame(s) whose DESCRIPTION primary is exactly 'NP V NP' (the basic transitive — the shape of the pinned rel(anchor,R,undergoer) worlds), taken from the nearest node on the member's root-to-subclass chain that has such a frame; THEMROLES resolve along the chain with the deepest definition winning (standard VerbNet subclass inheritance). (b) A synset's required side is defined iff at least one matched class entails a side on the undergoer and ALL side-entailing matched classes agree; conflicts yield none (logged). DISCLOSED tunable joint: reading a non-basic frame's object NP (e.g. build-26.1 'NP V NP.material PP.product', Material [+concrete]) as the undergoer is the one abuse with any effect, and the audit shows the diagnostic's conclusion is invariant under it (mapping-and-audit.md §5.2).
assumptions.rationale: The undergoer-role choice is the only mapping joint that could move the count; pinning it to the basic-transitive frame that matches the item shape, and auditing the worst-case abuse, removes the tuning degree of freedom the GPT-5.6 caution warned about.

assumptions.claim: SELECTIONAL-RESTRICTION -> G2-SIDE TABLE (authored input constant): selrestr-side-table.json projects EVERY one of the 28 restriction types occurring in any canonical verbnet3.3 THEMROLE onto {phys, abst, none}; the script asserts table keys == the measured type census in both directions (fail closed), so no type can be cherry-picked. Combination logic: negative ('-') restrictions never entail a side (the WN top split is not two-valued: entity also dominates thing n-00002452); 'or'-joined restrictions entail a side iff every disjunct entails that same side; 'and'-joined iff exactly one side appears among conjuncts (both sides -> contradiction flag, none). Exactly ONE table entry is load-bearing on the current inventory (solid -> phys, the break-45.1 Patient restriction); all others are inert because no other matched undergoer role carries any restriction — emitted in full precisely so this inertness is checkable.
assumptions.rationale: Projecting VerbNet's rich sortal vocabulary onto the instrument's two-sided G2 vocabulary is the construct amendment under evaluation; authoring the projection over the full type inventory before counting, with a mechanical completeness assert, is what makes the amendment auditable rather than tuned.
assumptions.backing_ref: poc/engine-inference/e2a-verbnet-diagnostic/selrestr-side-table.json; e2a_verbnet_diagnostic.py entail_side/vn_mapping census assert; mapping-and-audit.md §2 M3

assumptions.claim: MAPPING COVERAGE ON THE CURRENT INVENTORY: 6 of 13 minted verb synsets carry a VerbNet 3.3 member sense key — break.shatter v-00335806 and break.shatter-become v-00334996 (break-45.1), find.discover v-00723361 (discover-84), find.locate v-02290474 (discover-84 and get-13.5.1), make.create v-01624592 and v-01658171 (build-26.1/-1); zero sense keys were unmappable. Of the covered set, ONLY break-45.1 restricts the undergoer (Patient [+solid] -> required side phys); discover-84/get-13.5.1 Theme and build-26.1 Product are unrestricted. Uncovered: break.violate v-02572443 (the design's own 'break a promise' money contrast is not a VerbNet member sense), break.interrupt (both synsets), break.malfunction, make.cause (both synsets), make.create v-01657416, and friend (verbs-only). Net: VerbNet licenses a side-entailing restriction on exactly 2 of 13 minted verb synsets, both in lemma break.
assumptions.rationale: The rule-vs-inventory question turns first on how much of the inventory the alternative construct can even reach; recording the per-synset coverage and its reasons makes the O2 counts below checkable against the mapping rather than taken on trust.

assumptions.claim: O2 CELL CENSUS UNDER THE THREE CONSTRUCTS (outcome-free; cross-pair construction mirrors the pinned H2 shape: H1-object donors, seen-pair decontamination, ASM-2106 cell keys, novelty = cell absent from every seen item): (1) H2 hard unanimity (pinned): 2/13 union-base synsets unanimous, 3 anomaly items, 2 cells, 0 novel cells, lemma span {make} — reproducing ASM-2140's mechanism from inventory bytes alone. (2) VerbNet HARD (no attested object on the violating side, the unanimity-analog discipline): 0 of the 2 restricted synsets eligible — attested usage refutes hard [+solid] on both (shatter-become: fire; shatter: contract, first, stress) — 0 items, 0 cells, 0 novel. (3) VerbNet DEFEASIBLE (violable default; attested violations logged, never themselves anomalies): 2 eligible synsets, 18 items under the primary (same-lemma) donor pool and 114 under the secondary (any-lemma) pool, 2 cells under both pools — (v-00334996|abst|wn-something|anomaly) and (v-00335806|abst|wn-something|anomaly) — and 0 NOVEL cells under both pools: both cells were already realized by the seen frame's own G3 rule on 2026-07-12. KILL-e1 re-counted with each variant's novel-O2 addition: ops_spanned stays {O1} and the kill WOULD FIRE UNCHANGED under all three constructs (91 items / 17 cells / 4 lemmas / 1 op).
assumptions.rationale: These are the numbers maintainer decision #29 asked for: whether an amended construct populates O2 on the CURRENT inventory. They show the amendment restores anomaly items but zero binding cells, so the adequacy failure survives the strongest repair the named third-party source supports.

assumptions.claim: STRUCTURAL CELL-SPACE BOUND AND CONSTRUCT-AGNOSTIC HEADROOM: (a) an abst-side noun can never be wn-somebody (PERSON n-00007846 lies below PHYSICAL_ENTITY in the pinned closure, so person-hood forces the phys side), hence a phys-entailing restriction admits EXACTLY ONE anomaly cell per synset — (synset, abst, wn-something, anomaly) — and both such cells for the two VerbNet-restricted synsets are seen: the defeasible VerbNet construct is cell-space-EXHAUSTED on the current inventory regardless of donor pool. (b) Construct-agnostic ceiling [NOT GOLD]: ignoring restriction authority, single-side restrictions over the H1 donor pool could reach 30 novel anomaly cells spanning break/find/make (e.g. an abst-entailing restriction on find.discover — which K's own range C_info axiom asserts — would license 2 novel phys-violating cells); no third-party source in hand licenses these. The starvation is therefore not raw cell-space exhaustion of the inventory but the absence of third-party-licensable sortal differentiation on the current lemmas: VerbNet licenses only the 2 already-seen break cells and none of the 30-cell novel headroom.
assumptions.rationale: Separating the provable bound (what VerbNet can license: nothing novel) from the unlicensed headroom (what some authority could license: 30 cells) is what turns the counts into a usable steer — the deficit is gold AUTHORITY on these lemmas, which inventory extension along VerbNet-restricted lemmas would supply for both problems at once.

assumptions.claim: RULE-VS-INVENTORY VERDICT (a measurement reading for #29, NOT a feasibility conclusion, NOT an adoption): the rule-limitation is REAL — every hard-form anomaly construct dies on attested corpus objects (H2 unanimity 2/13 synsets; VerbNet-hard 0/2) — but repairing the rule alone does NOT repair E0 in place: the defeasible VerbNet amendment yields 0 novel O2 cells (2 cells, both seen, lemma span 1), the KILL-e1 ops criterion stays failed, and the freeze would stop again unchanged. The starvation is INVENTORY-LIMITED AT THE BINDING MARGIN, so populating O2 in a confirmatory frame requires the E2b inventory extension; [ASSESSMENT, one agent's steer] E2b lemma selection should prefer lemmas whose VerbNet classes genuinely restrict the undergoer, so that a maintainer-admitted construct amendment and the extension land together. CAVEATS carried verbatim from the audit: the VerbNet-defeasible and H2 gold sets are DISJOINT at the holdout margin (adoption would REPLACE, not refine, the O2 gold — the three pinned H2 items are make items VerbNet does not restrict); the side projection is conservative (can only under-count VerbNet-licensable anomalies); defeasible gold is presumptive, not decisive (GPT-5.6's caution stands), and would need the E1-named ~30-item human spot-audit if ever adopted.
assumptions.rationale: The task was to measure which limitation is binding so the maintainer can decide the construct question with numbers; both components are real and only their conjunction — defeasible construct PLUS sortally-differentiated inventory — clears the pre-registered adequacy bar, which is a construction fact, not a kernel-value claim.
